headline: Cruise Stocks Have Been Hit Hard. Norwegian Insiders See a Buying Opportunity.
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line shares have dropped more than 9% this month amid rising fuel prices and a rare viral outbreak.

headline: Frontier, Carnival, and Norwegian Cruise Line Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after easing pressure in the bond market and a pullback in oil prices boosted investor sentiment for consumer-facing companies.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Carnival, Lowers Price Target to $29
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Patrick Scholes   maintains Carnival (NYSE:CCL) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $30 to $29.
